description_long: This is a distorted and partially abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated limbs and a twisted torso. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted top and pants, with the clothing clinging closely to the body and showing some folds and creases. The arms and legs are unnaturally stretched and bent, giving the figure a surreal, almost melted appearance. The feet are visible and appear to be wearing shoes, though the details are blurred and stylized. The head and facial features are not clearly defined, and the overall form is more suggestive than anatomically accurate. The color palette is dominated by blue, white, and beige tones, with some areas of shadow and highlight.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure in fitted clothing with distorted limbs and indistinct facial features, primarily in blue, white, and beige.
description_view_0: The left side of the figure is visible, showing a bent leg and an arm extended forward, with the torso twisted and the head indistinct.
description_view_1: A top-down angle reveals the intersection of the limbs and torso, emphasizing the stretched and abstracted form.
description_view_2: The back of the figure is shown, highlighting the curvature of the spine and the unnatural extension of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: The right side of the figure is visible, with the leg and arm bent at sharp angles and the torso appearing narrow and elongated.
attribute_posture: walking with limbs extended and bent
